reference: WASN'T ANYTHING GOING ON THAT THIS TRIFLING MEMBER OF THE BUZZARD FAM'LY DIDN'T FIND OUT ABOUT AND MEDDLE IN HE COULD ASK MO QUESTIONS THAN PETER RABBIT CAN AN ANYBODY THAT CAN DO THAT HAS GOT TO ASK A LOT
text: Wasn't anything going on that this trifling member of the buzzard family didn't find out about and meddle in? He could ask more questions than Peter Rabbit can, and anybody that can do that has got to ask a lot.
